message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

box "Manage-Data-Exchanges" #LightBlue
participant CLI
participant Web
participant adc
end box

actor actorName

actorName -> CLI : adc-global-create()
CLI -> adc : global/create()
actorName -> Web : global/create()
Web -> adc : global/create()

actor actorName

@enduml
```
